interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the players inducted into the Hall of Fame along with their birthplaces?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the names and birthplaces of players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.BIRTH_CITY, P.BIRTH_STATE FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these players have won any awards?
interactions.intention: Find out which inducted players have won awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Show me the total number of ballots and votes for these players, sorted by the number of votes.
interactions.intention: See the ballots and votes totals for inducted players, ranked by votes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT H.BALLOTS, H.VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y' ORDER BY H.VOTES DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who were the players that received the most points for awards in a single year?
interactions.intention: Identify players who received the highest points for awards in a specific year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, MAX(POINTS_WON) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE GROUP BY PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the maximum number of first-place votes received by any player?
interactions.intention: Find the maximum number of first-place votes received by a player.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(VOTES_FIRST) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For the top players based on award points, what were their salaries in the same year?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the salaries of top players based on award points in the corresponding year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.PLAYER_ID, P.POINTS_WON, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND P.YEAR = S.YEAR ORDER BY P.POINTS_WON DESC

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players were inducted into the Hall of Fame and also received player award votes in the same year?
interactions.intention: Find players inducted into the Hall of Fame who also received player award votes in the same year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT HOF.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE PAV ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PAV.PLAYER_ID AND HOF.YEARID = PAV.YEAR WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many ballots were cast for those inducted players?
interactions.intention: Count the total ballots cast for players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(HOF.BALLOTS) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the average number of votes needed for induction among all inducted players?
interactions.intention: Calculate the average votes needed for induction among inducted players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AVG(HOF.NEEDED) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players in the Hall of Fame have won awards, and what were those awards?
interactions.intention: Find the players in the Hall of Fame along with the awards they have won.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, PA.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many votes did each of these players receive when inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Find the number of votes received by each player during their Hall of Fame induction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were the salaries of those players who won awards and were inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Find the salaries of players who were inducted into the Hall of Fame and also won awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players have won awards, and what are the details of those awards?
interactions.intention: Find players and the awards they have won along with award details.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, PA.AWARD_ID, PA.YEAR, PA.LEAGUE_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON P.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also include their salaries if available?
interactions.intention: Add salary information to the list of players with awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, PA.AWARD_ID, PA.YEAR, PA.LEAGUE_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON P.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players have won awards and also have a salary greater than $1,000,000?
interactions.intention: Find players who have won awards and have a salary greater than $1,000,000.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, PA.AWARD_ID, PA.YEAR, PA.LEAGUE_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA ON P.PLAYER_ID = PA.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE S.SALARY > 1000000

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of players inducted into the Hall of Fame and their birthplaces?
interactions.intention: Find the names and birthplaces of players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.BIRTH_CITY, P.BIRTH_STATE, P.BIRTH_COUNTRY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many votes did these players receive in total?
interactions.intention: Find the total votes received by the inducted players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(H.VOTES) AS TOTAL_VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Did any of these players receive awards, and if so, which ones?
interactions.intention: Check if the inducted players received any awards and list the awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who are the players born in the USA and what are their weights?
interactions.intention: Find the players born in the USA and their weights.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST, WEIGHT FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you list the awards won by these players?
interactions.intention: Find the awards won by the players born in the USA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these players weigh more than 200 pounds?
interactions.intention: Find players born in the USA who weigh more than 200 pounds.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA' AND WEIGHT > 200

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which inducted players are from the United States, and what cities and states were they born in?
interactions.intention: Find the inducted players from the United States and their birth cities and states.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.BIRTH_CITY, P.BIRTH_STATE FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you also tell me the salary details of these inducted players?
interactions.intention: Retrieve salary information for the inducted players identified earlier.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.YEAR, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON H.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of the inducted players along with their birthplaces and salary details?
interactions.intention: Combine the names, birthplaces, and salary information of inducted players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.BIRTH_CITY, P.BIRTH_STATE, S.YEAR, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON H.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who were the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: Find the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What awards did these players win in their careers?
interactions.intention: Find the awards won by the players inducted in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD WHERE PLAYER_ID IN (SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which player received the most votes for Hall of Fame induction that year?
interactions.intention: Identify the player with the most votes for Hall of Fame induction in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND VOTES = (SELECT MAX(VOTES) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who are the players born in the USA?
interactions.intention: Find the players born in the USA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of these players were born in the state of Alabama?
interactions.intention: Identify players born in Alabama from the previously listed players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA' AND BIRTH_STATE = 'AL'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were their salaries in 1985?
interactions.intention: Find the 1985 salaries of players born in Alabama.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA' AND P.BIRTH_STATE = 'AL' AND S.YEAR = 1985

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the points won by players who received awards in the same year and league?
interactions.intention: Find the points won by players who received awards in the same year and league.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.PLAYER_ID, V.POINTS_WON FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND P.YEAR = V.YEAR AND P.LEAGUE_ID = V.LEAGUE_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who had the highest points won among them?
interactions.intention: Find the player with the highest points won among those who received awards in the same year and league.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.PLAYER_ID, MAX(V.POINTS_WON) AS MAX_POINTS FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND P.YEAR = V.YEAR AND P.LEAGUE_ID = V.LEAGUE_ID GROUP BY P.PLAYER_ID ORDER BY MAX_POINTS DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were their salaries during that year?
interactions.intention: Find the salaries of the player with the highest points won during the award year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.PLAYER_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND P.YEAR = V.YEAR AND P.LEAGUE_ID = V.LEAGUE_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON V.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND V.YEAR = S.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the players inducted into the Hall of Fame along with the salaries they earned in their careers?
interactions.intention: Find players inducted into the Hall of Fame and their career salaries.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, HOF.INDUCTED, SAL.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY SAL ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = SAL.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which year had the highest number of votes for inducted players?
interactions.intention: Identify the year with the highest number of votes for players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT YEARID, MAX(VOTES) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y' GROUP BY YEARID ORDER BY MAX(VOTES) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For the inducted players, what were their award points won in their respective leagues?
interactions.intention: Get award points won in respective leagues for inducted players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, AWARD.LEAGUE_ID, AWARD.POINTS_WON FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE AWARD ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = AWARD.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names and birthplaces of players who have been inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Find the names and birthplaces of players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.BIRTH_CITY, P.BIRTH_STATE FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many players inducted into the Hall of Fame were voted in by the BBWAA?
interactions.intention: Find the number of players inducted into the Hall of Fame through votes by BBWAA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y' AND VOTEDBY = 'BBWAA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those inducted by the BBWAA, what awards have they won?
interactions.intention: Find the awards won by players inducted into the Hall of Fame by the BBWAA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON H.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND H.VOTEDBY = 'BBWAA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the first names and last names of players inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the first and last names of players who were inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were the salaries of these players in the year they were inducted?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the salaries of the players in the year they were inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND H.YEARID = S.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which teams did these players belong to when they earned those salaries?
interactions.intention: Find out the teams the players belonged to when they earned the salaries in the year they were inducted.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.TEAM_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID INNER JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND H.YEARID = S.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the awards received by players along with their names?
interactions.intention: Find the awards received by players and their names.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players received awards and also have salary information?
interactions.intention: Find players who received awards and also have salary information.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, A.AWARD_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the average salary of players who have received awards?
interactions.intention: Calculate the average salary of players who have received awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AVG(S.SALARY) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD A JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON A.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the names of players born in the USA?
interactions.intention: Find the first and last names of players born in the USA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Among those players, who was born in Colorado?
interactions.intention: Find the first and last names of players born in Colorado, USA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA' AND BIRTH_STATE = 'CO'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were the salaries of players born in Colorado?
interactions.intention: Find the salaries of players born in Colorado.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA' AND P.BIRTH_STATE = 'CO'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Who were the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: Find the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What awards did those players win?
interactions.intention: Find the awards won by the players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H ON P.PLAYER_ID = H.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What were their salaries in 1936?
interactions.intention: Find the salaries of players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H ON S.PLAYER_ID = H.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND S.YEAR = 1936

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you show me the players who won awards and also received votes for them in the same year?
interactions.intention: Find players who won awards and also received votes for them in the same year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND P.YEAR = V.YEAR AND P.LEAGUE_ID = V.LEAGUE_ID AND P.PLAYER_ID = V.PLAYER_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which of those players also have salary records in the same league and year?
interactions.intention: Find players who won awards, received votes for them, and also have salary records in the same league and year.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND P.YEAR = V.YEAR AND P.LEAGUE_ID = V.LEAGUE_ID AND P.PLAYER_ID = V.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON V.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND V.YEAR = S.YEAR AND V.LEAGUE_ID = S.LEAGUE_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you provide the total salary of those players in each league?
interactions.intention: Get the total salary of players who won awards, received votes, and have salary records, grouped by league.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.LEAGUE_ID, SUM(S.SALARY) AS TOTAL_SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.AWARD_ID = V.AWARD_ID AND P.YEAR = V.YEAR AND P.LEAGUE_ID = V.LEAGUE_ID AND P.PLAYER_ID = V.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON V.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID AND V.YEAR = S.YEAR AND V.LEAGUE_ID = S.LEAGUE_ID GROUP BY S.LEAGUE_ID

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the number of ballots and votes needed for Hall of Fame induction?
interactions.intention: Find the number of ballots and votes needed for Hall of Fame induction.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT BALLOTS, NEEDED FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many votes did the inducted players receive?
interactions.intention: Find the number of votes received by the inducted players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the salaries of players who were inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Find the salaries of players who were inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON H.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names of the players inducted into the Hall of Fame and their birthplaces?
interactions.intention: Find the names and birthplaces of players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST, P.BIRTH_CITY, P.BIRTH_STATE, P.BIRTH_COUNTRY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the total number of votes received by all inducted players?
interactions.intention: Calculate the total votes received by all inducted players.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(VOTES) AS TOTAL_VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which inducted player received the highest number of votes?
interactions.intention: Identify the inducted player with the highest number of votes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT PLAYER_ID, VOTES FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y' AND VOTES = (SELECT MAX(VOTES) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y')

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players who won awards in the National League in 1877 also received votes for any awards?
interactions.intention: Find players who won awards in the National League in 1877 and also received votes for any awards.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT PA.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE PV ON PA.PLAYER_ID = PV.PLAYER_ID AND PA.AWARD_ID = PV.AWARD_ID AND PA.YEAR = PV.YEAR AND PA.LEAGUE_ID = PV.LEAGUE_ID WHERE PA.LEAGUE_ID = 'NL' AND PA.YEAR = 1877

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those players, what were their salaries in 1985?
interactions.intention: Find the salaries in 1985 for the players identified previously.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.PLAYER_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE PV ON PA.PLAYER_ID = PV.PLAYER_ID AND PA.AWARD_ID = PV.AWARD_ID AND PA.YEAR = PV.YEAR AND PA.LEAGUE_ID = PV.LEAGUE_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON PV.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE PA.LEAGUE_ID = 'NL' AND PA.YEAR = 1877 AND S.YEAR = 1985

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What was the highest salary among those players?
interactions.intention: Find the highest salary among the players identified previously.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT MAX(S.SALARY) AS HIGHEST_SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S WHERE S.YEAR = 1985 AND S.PLAYER_ID IN (SELECT DISTINCT PA.PLAYER_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD PA JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE PV ON PA.PLAYER_ID = PV.PLAYER_ID AND PA.AWARD_ID = PV.AWARD_ID AND PA.YEAR = PV.YEAR AND PA.LEAGUE_ID = PV.LEAGUE_ID WHERE PA.LEAGUE_ID = 'NL' AND PA.YEAR = 1877)

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How many players were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: Find the total number of players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What category were these players inducted under?
interactions.intention: Retrieve the categories under which the players inducted in 1936 were categorized.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT CATEGORY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE YEARID = 1936 AND INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the birth countries of the players inducted in 1936?
interactions.intention: Find the birth countries of players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT DISTINCT P.BIRTH_COUNTRY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the awards received by players who were inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936?
interactions.intention: Find awards received by players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.AWARD_ID, P.YEAR, P.LEAGUE_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: For those same players, what were their votes in the award voting process?
interactions.intention: Find the votes in award voting process for players inducted into the Hall of Fame in 1936.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT V.POINTS_WON, V.POINTS_MAX, V.VOTES_FIRST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.PLAYER_ID = V.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which awards did they win in the same year they were inducted?
interactions.intention: Find awards won by players in the same year they were inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.AWARD_ID FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME H JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD P ON H.PLAYER_ID = P.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE V ON P.PLAYER_ID = V.PLAYER_ID WHERE H.YEARID = 1936 AND H.INDUCTED = 'Y' AND H.YEARID = P.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What are the names and birthplaces of players born in the USA?
interactions.intention: Find the names and birthplaces of players born in the USA.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST, BIRTH_COUNTRY, BIRTH_STATE, BIRTH_CITY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER WHERE BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Which players from the USA have received award votes?
interactions.intention: Find players born in the USA who have received award votes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT P.NAME_FIRST, P.NAME_LAST FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the salary information for those players?
interactions.intention: Retrieve salary information for players born in the USA who have received award votes.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT S.YEAR, S.TEAM_ID, S.LEAGUE_ID, S.SALARY FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER P JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE A ON P.PLAYER_ID = A.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY S ON P.PLAYER_ID = S.PLAYER_ID WHERE P.BIRTH_COUNTRY = 'USA'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: Can you tell me the total number of ballots cast for players inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Find the total number of ballots cast for players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT SUM(BALLOTS) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y'

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: How does the salary of players from the Hall of Fame compare to their award voting points?
interactions.intention: Compare the salary of Hall of Fame players to their award voting points.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, HOF.YEARID, SAL.SALARY, VOTE.POINTS_WON FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE VOTE ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = VOTE.PLAYER_ID AND HOF.YEARID = VOTE.YEAR JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY SAL ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = SAL.PLAYER_ID AND HOF.YEARID = SAL.YEAR

interactions.speaker: User
interactions.utterance: What is the average number of votes received by players inducted into the Hall of Fame?
interactions.intention: Find the average number of votes received by players inducted into the Hall of Fame.

ground_truths.golden_sql: SELECT AVG(VOTES) FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME WHERE INDUCTED = 'Y'
